task.title: Create Expo mobile app project
task.description: Initialize Expo SDK 50 project with React Native, NativeWind, and navigation setup

implementation.details: Setup Expo project with SDK 50, install NativeWind for styling, configure React Navigation with tab and stack navigators, setup basic project structure.

task.acceptance_criteria: Expo app builds and runs on simulator/device, navigation works correctly, NativeWind styles apply, app compiles without errors
